channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Rubbish been hear since Friday, 2nd May
item.description:
Surely we’re intilted to a regular litter pick the people that live in old Ivanhoe pub se5 8dh are absolutely filthy surely Southwark should get in contact with owners of property

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 39, Ivanhoe Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping next to bin, 2nd May
item.description:
Rubbish is regularly fly tipped by this bin from people who have rented the church spaces. They are not allowed to dispose of their rubbish in the church bins so they fly tip it here. It then sits here all weekend attracting vermin.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Northchurch Terrace, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road surface surrounding gutter is broken and crumbling., 2nd May
item.description:
This is getting worse.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Long Lane, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegal parking, 2nd May
item.description:
Hjh

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 30, Snowsfields, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Filthy lift area, 2nd May
item.description:
The lift area in village way multi story car park is filthy on 1st and 2nd floor. There is rubbish, urine and vomit all over the floor. It is disgusting and urgently needs cleaning. The smell of urine in overwhelming and the area needs to be Sanitized.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Coopers Mews, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping on flower bed, 2nd May
item.description:
By former library
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Green Lanes, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Problem with bins outside our property, 2nd May
item.description:
On a daily basis the bin which is positioned outside of our property 17, Avondale Rise, by the bus stop is being emptied by birds and foxes and spread all over the pavement. There are currently two blue bags which have been left there by the council for several days and the birds and foxes are picking at spreading it all over the pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 39, Avondale Rise, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Influx of graffiti along 20 Sidney Street SW9 sprayed on Lamberh Council storage units and bin containers. Located at Stockwell Park Road SW9., 2nd May
item.description:
I like to report an influx of graffiti along Sidney Street SW9. Located near Stockwell Park Road SW9. The graffiti is sprayed on Lambeth council storage units and bin containers. There is more graffiti further up Sidney Street which is very visible. Please can the graffiti be removed. The graffiti has been there for a little over two weeks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 17, Sidney Road, Stockwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: HMO eviction and tenants belongings dump, 2nd May
item.description:
This is a HMO property and every time a tenant is evicted/leaves the landlord dumps their belongings outside. Rats have been seen in the rubbish.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Plumstead High Street, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped black bags, 2nd May
item.description:
Flytipped black bags
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 565, Lordship Lane, Dulwich, Greater London

item.title: Toilet cistern, rubbish and bin full of junk have been dumped., 2nd May
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 34, Padua Road, Anerley, Greater London

item.title: Bins overflowing, 2nd May
item.description:
Bins overflowing with rubbish all down the road on a daily basis

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 420, Downham Way, Downham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked road drain, 2nd May
item.description:
Blocked road drain outside 81 Gertrude Road. Full of soil. Tried to dislodge but its too blocked

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gertrude Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Numerous large pot holes on the top half of Cobden Mews, 2nd May
item.description:
Pot holes have been here for years and getting worse. Real potential to damagw cars and be a trip hazard for kids and elderly people.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cobden Mews, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sewage issues, 2nd May
item.description:
There is a blockage a number of drains causing drainage issues and over flowing sewage coming up and the surrounding area, leaving unpleasant smells and concern for SRC community nursery as this is affecting our drains as well as the housing around these drains.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): New Frederick Mews, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked sewage, 2nd May
item.description:
There is a blockage a number of drains causing drainage issues and over flowing sewage coming up and the surrounding area, leaving unpleasant smells and concern for SRC community nursery as this is affecting our drains as well as the housing around these drains.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): New Frederick Mews, Elephant and Castle, Greater London

item.title: Sewage drain issues, 2nd May
item.description:
There is a blockage a number of drains causing drainage issues and over flowing sewage coming up and the surrounding area, leaving unpleasant smells and concern for SRC community nursery as this is affecting our drains as well as the housing around these drains.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 46, Braganza Street, Elephant and Castle, Greater London

item.title: Overhanging tree hitting passing people when windy.., 2nd May
item.description:
The lowest branch is 3ft off the ground and the ones a bit higher overhanging when the wind blows the general public are in danger

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Palace View, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Traffic Bollards x2 displaced, 2nd May
item.description:
Two orange traffic cones have been sat on middle-of-the-road-pedestrian-traffic-island for a few weeks. Yellow traffic bollard awol. Outside 1 Battersea Square, SW11 3RA

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 36, Battersea Square, Battersea, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
